features.title: Index skill + plugin.json scaffold
steps: plugins/harness-sales-suite/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists with correct structure
plugins/harness-sales-suite/skills/harness-sales-suite/SKILL.md exists as index skill

Index skill has pipeline phases and phase routing by deal type
Index skill has criteria key mapping table
Index skill has domain verification methods table

features.title: Core sales domain skill (harness-sales)
steps: plugins/harness-sales-suite/skills/harness-sales/SKILL.md exists
Has 6 core sections (methodology, development methodology, verification, deliverable verification, evaluation criteria, checklists)
Evaluation criteria: qualification_depth, pipeline_coverage, deal_documentation, close_readiness with 0-5 anchors
Methodologies: MEDDPICC, Challenger, SPIN, Sandler, BANT with selection table
Anti-patterns: happy ears, single-threading, premature discounting, ghosted pipeline
Security: pricing confidentiality, customer PII embedded in checklists

features.title: Tender management domain skill (harness-tm)
steps: plugins/harness-sales-suite/skills/harness-tm/SKILL.md exists

Evaluation criteria: compliance_coverage, response_completeness, win_theme_clarity, submission_readiness with 0-5 anchors
Methodologies: APMP/Shipley, capture management, color team reviews
Anti-patterns: non-compliant response, generic win themes, missed deadline
Security: pricing confidentiality, competitive intel protection
